item.title: The reality of harvest day
item.description: A straightforward look at harvest day on the farm, showing the work, the pace, and the everyday reality behind getting the crop in.

media:content.media:title: The reality of harvest day
media:content.media:description: A straightforward look at harvest day on the farm, showing the work, the pace, and the everyday reality behind getting the crop in.

item.title: Storm Damage Hits the Farm Hard
item.description: A hard storm leaves its mark on the farm, showing the tough side of rural life and the work ahead.

media:content.media:title: Storm Damage Hits the Farm Hard
media:content.media:description: A hard storm leaves its mark on the farm, showing the tough side of rural life and the work ahead.

item.title: A Girl and Her Big Rig
item.description: Laura Farms shares a simple, upbeat look at life with a big rig on the farm.

media:content.media:title: A Girl and Her Big Rig
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a simple, upbeat look at life with a big rig on the farm.

item.title: Harvesting a Neighbor’s Field
item.description: Laura Farms heads out to harvest a neighbor’s field, sharing a practical day of farm work and teamwork in the field.

media:content.media:title: Harvesting a Neighbor’s Field
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms heads out to harvest a neighbor’s field, sharing a practical day of farm work and teamwork in the field.

item.title: The Future of Farming Is Here
item.description: Laura Farms shares a positive look at what’s ahead for farming, with a hopeful, energetic feel and a celebration of progress on the farm.

media:content.media:title: The Future of Farming Is Here
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a positive look at what’s ahead for farming, with a hopeful, energetic feel and a celebration of progress on the farm.

item.title: A Quick Fix in the Field Today
item.description: Laura Farms shares a quick field fix today, keeping things moving with a practical, hands-on approach to farm work.

media:content.media:title: A Quick Fix in the Field Today
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a quick field fix today, keeping things moving with a practical, hands-on approach to farm work.

item.title: Drones vs. Farmers on the Farm
item.description: A simple look at drones and farmers in action, showing modern farm life and the work that keeps things moving.

media:content.media:title: Drones vs. Farmers on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A simple look at drones and farmers in action, showing modern farm life and the work that keeps things moving.

item.title: The Real Cost of Farming Right Now
item.description: Laura Farms shares a real look at the cost of farming right now, reflecting the daily realities, hard work, and determination behind life on the farm.

media:content.media:title: The Real Cost of Farming Right Now
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a real look at the cost of farming right now, reflecting the daily realities, hard work, and determination behind life on the farm.

item.title: Taking This Massive Combine for a Spin
item.description: Laura Farms takes a massive combine for a spin, sharing a hands-on look at farm machinery and daily life in the field.

media:content.media:title: Taking This Massive Combine for a Spin
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes a massive combine for a spin, sharing a hands-on look at farm machinery and daily life in the field.

item.title: Stop Buying Tools on the Farm
item.description: Laura Farms shares a simple reminder about making do with what you have and keeping farm work practical.

media:content.media:title: Stop Buying Tools on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a simple reminder about making do with what you have and keeping farm work practical.
